step_rationale: MI biomarker downregulated in acute MI; intracellular chaperone altered during cardiomyocyte damage.
mechanism: PPIA downregulation in acute MI reflects disruption of intracellular protein folding and cellular stress in ischemic myocardium.

references.title: Plasma Exosomal Proteomics Identifies Differentially Expressed Proteins as Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
Discovery of potential plasma protein biomarkers for acute myocardial infarction via proteomics.
